name: CoE Resume Sample

experience.title: Test Engineering Intern
bullets: Managed data certification for a fintech app, identifying and resolving defects resulting in over 20,000 hours saved
Targeted an 80% reduction in defects by the end of 2025 Q4, resulting in a 40% decrease in nonproductive time
Engaged upstream IT and functional application ownership to implement process and system changes
Constructed SQL queries to identify and evaluate magnitudes of 16 known data defect types
Developed a Tableau dashboard to drive transparency through continual monitoring and reporting back to senior leadership

education.institution: Binghamton University, State University of New York, Thomas J. Watson College of Engineering and Applied Science
highlights: Eta Kappa Nu Electrical and Computer Engineering Honor Society
Relevant Coursework: Network Computer Security, Computer Network Architecture, Introduction to Python

awards.title: First Place, Fall 2022 Tournament
awards.context: Competed in bi-weekly matches and semesterly tournaments

projects.name: Robot Maze Project
projects.description: Led a team of four to create a robot that solved a line maze using an AVR microcontroller programmed in C
projects.outcome: Validated functionality by completing the maze in less than three minutes from an arbitrary starting point

projects.name: Robot Control Project
projects.description: Created a system to control a robot's position on a flat, level surface using an attached Papilio DUO with a general-purpose processor created using schematic capture in Xilinx ISE Project Navigator
projects.outcome: Designed an instruction set with opcode field for movement, branch, and jump instructions

projects.name: 4-Bit Three-Function Calculator
projects.description: Designed a circuit in Xilinx ISE Project Navigator that could add, subtract, and multiply any two 4-bit numbers, with results displayed on a seven-segment display of a Papilio DUO
projects.outcome: Constructed detailed documentation for each piece of the design including rationale, operating premise, and usage description

projects.name: Image & Acoustic Signals Analysis
projects.description: Researched Leap Motion, Microsoft Kinect, and Microsoft HoloLens applications to lessen occlusion when analyzing dynamic sign language gestures
projects.outcome: Collaborated in a team of four to document findings for future development by other research teams

projects.name: Engineering Conceptual Design Project: UV Dosimeter
projects.description: Partnered with a team of nine to research and design a proof-of-concept low-cost UV dosimeter using Solid Edge
projects.outcome: Verified requirements formally upon completion of the project to ensure customer satisfaction

leadership.description: Design a competitive combat robot in Fusion 360 compliant with WCRL rules; program an Arduino Nano via Bluetooth iOS app for drive and weapon actions; compete in bi-weekly matches and semesterly tournaments
Foster a safe and inclusive community among 24 diverse residents; collaborate with 12 peers to execute creative programs and foster student development

leadership.organization: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE)
leadership.description: Developed a security app at Hack AE as an IEEE representative; facilitate professional, technical, and social events for the 50+ member general body
